chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2124 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 11538/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No. 11539/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 18.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Samee, Advocate a/w Applicants ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Applicants Azhar Udin, Abdul Sattar, Athar Ali, Zafar Ali, Zaheer Ali son of Muhammad Umar Charan, Samiullah son of Abdul Sattar and Ubaid Raza son of Mazhar Ali Charan, are present along with their Counsel to seek protective bail to enable them to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicants submits that applicants are innocent and have been falsely implicated by complainant in Crime No. 82/2025 of PS GOR Hyderabad, under Section 324/147/148/149/504/427/34 PPC, and police has shaken hands with complainant party and it is made difficult for applicants to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such they have appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, applicants above named are granted protective bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Ashraf
